text:
On http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/developers-handbook/x4393.html after the device code, the examples for someone to type (with the prompt, etc.,) are all out of alignmnet with eachother, possibly due to hardcoded spacing?

Fix: 

na
How-To-Repeat: view http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/developers-handbook/x4393.html below the example code, near the mknod example, and example of using the device
